codeReview.summary: Compared the original failed hero-visual review with the fix commit, handoff, and transcript skeleton. The fix closes both prior blockers: `VisualEffectsProvider.tsx` now guards unsupported `matchMedia`/listener APIs behind safe helpers, and `HeroShaderCanvas.tsx` now routes runtime `webglcontextlost` and render-loop failures through the same fallback path as init-time failures. Focused regressions were added for both cases, so the original fallback gaps are adequately addressed.

summary: Review passed. This rerun fix adequately resolves the original blocking fallback issues by hardening unsupported media-query handling and converting runtime WebGL failures into the same clean fallback path, with matching regression coverage.
